articles.title_en: Heavy rains flood parts of Russia, knocking out power, swamping a Moscow train station, and turning streets into rivers
articles.lead_en: Heavy rains swept across several Russian regions over the past weekend. Parts of Moscow received nearly half their monthly rainfall in a single storm that toppled trees, flooded Novy Arbat, Kutuzovsky Prospekt, and other streets, along with underground parking garages and the Leningradsky railway station.
